LAW AND MOTION, PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT WINDY CITY ORGANICS, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 =302/HK
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-04-2019 VACATED. JUDGMENT FILED 10/10/18. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Windy City Organics, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 =302/hk
